title: Mistral PyPI mistralai 2.4.6 import-time dropper

advisories.title: Malicious dropper in mistralai 2.4.6 PyPI package

known_gaps: GHSA malicious-package advisories are not classified as malware unless they also use MAL-* or PYSEC-MAL-* IDs.
Import-time Python malware static analysis is not yet part of incident replay.
Reachability should be used as execution evidence, not as a reason to suppress a known malicious package.
